name: Aegis Protocol
description: AI Agent Skill Marketplace on Solana. 452 operators with trust scoring, NeMo guardrails, USDC micropayments. Creators earn 60% of every invocation fee.

skills.name: Search Skill Operators
skills.description: Search 452 AI agent skill operators by capability, category, price, or trust score
examples: Search for DeFi trading skills under $0.10

skills.name: Invoke Skill Operator
skills.description: Invoke any operator with USDC payment on Solana. Returns HTTP 402 with payment instructions. Pay and retry to execute.

skills.name: Check Trust Score
skills.description: Query the 5-dimension trust score for any operator: success rate, review score, response time, uptime, verification
